overall.description: A bus simulator game featuring first-person driving of a yellow double-decker bus through rainy urban streets, transitioning to a third-person external showcase of the vehicle in a depot. The footage displays realistic rain effects, wet road reflections, and detailed cockpit instrumentation characteristic of modern driving simulations.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban multi-lane street with commercial buildings and bus stops

events.description: bus makes a right turn at an intersection, navigating around the corner
bus passes parked vehicles including a white van on the right side of the road
bus slows down and pulls over to stop at a bus stop on the right

agents.ego_description: operating a double-decker bus through wet city streets, navigating intersections and traffic before pulling over at a bus stop to allow passenger boarding

person walking along the sidewalk approaching the bus stop

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person perspective from the driver's seat of a double-decker bus navigating through rainy urban streets. The bus passes modern glass office buildings and commercial structures, makes a right turn at an intersection, and pulls over at a bus stop where a pedestrian is waiting. Rain streaks across the windshield as wipers operate continuously.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus depot parking area with multiple vehicle bays

events.description: camera switches from interior cockpit view to external third-person perspective
location changes from city street to open bus depot parking area
camera begins orbiting around the stationary bus to showcase exterior details

agents.ego_description: camera circles around the stationary yellow double-decker bus, highlighting its exterior design and rain-soaked surfaces

entered.detail: yellow and black double-decker bus with 'be Berlin' branding, covered in rain droplets
large industrial depot structure with multiple bays in the background
tall illumination poles lighting the depot area
other yellow buses parked in the background of the depot

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to an external third-person view of the stationary yellow double-decker bus parked in an open depot area. The camera orbits around the vehicle, showcasing the 'be Berlin' livery, rain-covered windows, and detailed exterior modeling. Other buses and depot infrastructure are visible in the background under the overcast, rainy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot transitions from an immersive first-person driving experience through a rainy city to an external cinematic showcase of the vehicle in a depot. It begins from the driver's seat of a yellow double-decker bus, navigating past modern glass office buildings and making a right turn through rain-streaked windshields. As the bus pulls over at a stop for a waiting pedestrian, the perspective seamlessly shifts from the cockpit to an external third-person view. The camera then orbits around the stationary bus, revealing the be Berlin livery and rain-covered windows against the backdrop of an overcast depot. Finally, the view expands to show other buses and industrial infrastructure under the persistent gray sky.
